prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph with fatigue undertone. London suburban home living room, 10 PM at night. A Black British woman in her early 40s (Naomi — short natural hair or neat braids, still in work clothes loosened, tired expression) sits on a sofa with a laptop on her lap. The laptop screen casts a cool blue-white glow on her face. On the coffee table, a mug of cold tea (no steam). The window behind is dark — nighttime. A warm table lamp glows in the background. Children's toys and books are scattered around the sofa edges, signs of family life. The laptop screen shows multiple browser tabs (blurred, unreadable). Color grading: darker than the hero shot but not pitch black. Warm tired tones mixed with cool laptop light. Strong film-like desaturation with a faded quality. The mug's ceramic rim catches an extremely faint prismatic spectral hint. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. Naomi and laptop are in the center-lower area. Upper portion is the dark living room with warm lamp bokeh. More objects in frame than usual — a cluttered, lived-in feeling. Camera: 50mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 800. More pronounced film grain for the dim environment. Old-lens softness. Dark areas have visible noise texture. The mood is 'late-night parental labor' — tired but persisting for the kids. The resigned 'this is just how shopping works' feeling.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, plastic skin, studio lighting, bright room, daytime, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration, happy expression
